name: Kesoram Industries Limited
summary: Kesoram Industries Limited manufactures and markets cement products under the Birla Shakti brand in India. It also offers rayon, transparent paper, and filament yarn under the Kesoram Rayon brand. The company was formerly known as Kesoram Industries & Cotton Mills Ltd. and changed its name to Kesoram Industries Limited in 1986. Kesoram Industries Limited was founded in 1919 and is based in Kolkata, India.
